hero_subtitle: SFTY helps compliance leaders prepare for audits by preserving case history and evidentiary records within a unified workflow designed for digital asset businesses.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_description: Executive teams struggle to prepare for inspections when compliance evidence and case histories are scattered across disconnected systems. This fragmentation slows audit readiness and obscures the full lineage of decisions, increasing operational risk and complicating bank due diligence.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY centralizes compliance cases, evidence, provider outputs and decision history into a unified workflow giving executive teams transparent risk visibility and streamlined audit readiness for inspections.
workflow_title: From case creation to inspection-ready evidence
workflow_description: SFTY connects alerts, reviews, case workflows and decision records into structured evidence packages for defensible compliance inspections and regulatory reporting.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_description: SFTY provides VASP executives with a provider-neutral layer that links compliance outputs to case history and audit evidence for stronger inspection readiness.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports VASPs with operational evidence, case history and provider coordination to enhance compliance inspection readiness and strengthen audit and due diligence controls.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance
ask_sfty_placeholder: How can SFTY support inspection readiness and audit evidence
ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how case history preserves evidence for compliance reviews
ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Show how workflows improve risk visibility for executive teams
ask_sfty_chip_3_message: Describe how SFTY supports bank due diligence and governance
ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for compliance executives?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides compliance executives a connected view of workflows, risk, audit trails and reporting to reduce operational risk and improve decision visibility across digital asset operations.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY support inspection readiness?
faq_2_answer: SFTY structures case history, decision logs and evidence packages to help compliance teams prepare for regulatory inspections and internal audits with organized, reviewable records.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves audit logs by capturing provider outputs, reviewer actions and decisions in a secure, tamper-resistant format for defensible compliance reviews.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing compliance stacks?
faq_4_answer: Yes, SFTY connects multiple providers and data sources into one operational layer without disrupting existing KYC, KYT, Travel Rule or screening tools.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace current compliance providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY sits above existing providers, turning their outputs into structured workflows, decisions, cases and reports rather than replacing underlying compliance systems.
final_title: Strengthen inspection readiness with structured evidence
final_description: Review how SFTY connects case history and audit-ready evidence to support executive compliance risk control for VASPs.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
